name: Kesla Oyj
summary: Kesla Oyj, a machine engineering company, manufactures and markets forestry and material handling technology products in Finland and internationally. The company offers forest machine cranes, such as forwarder, skidder, and harvester cranes; tractor forest equipment, including loaders, trailers, and stroke delimbers; and harvester heads comprising roller and stroke feed harvester heads. It also provides chippers; and grapples, such as timber and bioenergy grapples, grapples for excavators, and felling heads. In addition, the company offers truck and stationary cranes, such as cut-to-length-cranes, tree-length cranes, z-cranes, bioenergy cranes, industrial cranes, and cranes for recycling industry, as well as cabins and high seats. Kesla Oyj was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Joensuu, Finland.
